item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ah beans, I did just write about something that can be locked up and forgotten about. Welp, back to the drawing board!
Thanks for your response!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The article is ok, though in many aspects could be improved, the foundation takes on a clinical tone in articles and idioms are usually not used in the tone, clinical tone is meant to be specific.

The rosy glasses are interesting but it is kind of like a regular anomalous object, the object just gives a rush of dopamine but it is just a pair of magical glasses that makes the wearer happy and doesn't really warrant an article, just contained on one of the security lockers with the key being held by a researcher and having an entry in the list of anomalous objects

I still believe that there's potential in here though, maybe add to it more? Take it more in a direction of your choosing.
